title: Sergio Escobar
text: Welcome. I am a mathematics researcher interested in quantum information, mathematical physics, Markov chains, representation theory, and combinatorics.

title: Sergio Escobar
text:
Research
My work focuses on mixing times, symmetry, quantum dynamics, and related problems in probability and representation theory.

title: Sergio Escobar
text:
Papers and notes
This site hosts my papers, research notes, and mathematical blog posts.
